description: claude-kit core hooks. SessionStart freshness/git gate (PLAN.md 5.3) + Stop push-gate (never leave unpushed commits, keep-tracker-current) + SessionEnd backup & end-of-session write reminder (PLAN.md 5.4). Canonical procedures live in memory/README.md — these hooks surface the deterministic signals and enforce push; memory/handoff authoring stays the agent's job. This file is the portable plugin deployment (activates when claude-kit is installed as a plugin, Part 10); the claude-kit repo itself activates the same scripts now via .claude/settings.json (Part 7.2 activation diff).
